ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Type of reinforcement learning algorithm used */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Type of environment used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, ongoing, failed) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the experiment */,
  "researcher" TEXT /* Researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Other researchers involved in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "code_version" TEXT /* Version of the code used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode within the experiment */,
  "step_count" INTEGER /* Total number of steps in the episode */,
  "reward" REAL /* Total reward received in the episode */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the episode */,
  "environment_state" TEXT /* Initial state of the environment at the start of the episode */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the episode ended (e.g., timeout, goal reached) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this agent belongs to */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., Q-Learning, Deep Q-Networks) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the agent */,
  "training_history" TEXT /* Training history of the agent, including checkpoints */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics specific to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode this action belongs to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that took this action */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the episode when this action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., move left, move right) */,
  "action_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the action */,
  "resulting_state" TEXT /* State of the environment after the action is taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode this reward belongs to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that received this reward */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the episode when this reward was received */,
  "reward" REAL /* Value of the reward received */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "reward_source" TEXT /* Source of the reward (e.g., environment, other agent) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the reward was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode this result belongs to */,
  "agent0_rew" REAL /* Total reward received by agent 0 */,
  "agent1_rew" REAL /* Total reward received by agent 1 */,
  "agent2_rew" REAL /* Total reward received by agent 2 */,
  "agent3_rew" REAL /* Total reward received by agent 3 */,
  "episode_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the episode, including key events or observations */,
  "agent_performance" TEXT /* Detailed performance metrics for each agent */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the results of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
